steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage's final sentence—stating that understanding horizontal gene transfer “might result in the mitigation of dangerous pathogens”—reveals the main point: HGT study has practical, useful implications.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The correct choice states “The study of horizontal gene transfer may yield findings with useful applications.” This matches the passage's emphasis on why understanding HGT matters: it could help mitigate dangerous pathogens. The other three choices either invent a misconception being corrected, introduce research comparisons not in the text, or claim a shift in beliefs—none of which the passage supports. That matches choice C — C is correct.
